Query.SQL: SELECT CCE.CASE_NUMBER AS "CCE.CASE_NUMBER" , CCE.CO_NUMBER AS "CCE.CO_NUMBER" , CCE.STD_EVENT_ID AS "CCE.STD_EVENT_ID" , CCE.EVENT_DETAILS AS "CCE.EVENT_DETAILS" , sysdate AS "CCE.EVENT_DATE" , 'N' AS "CCE.DELETED_FLAG" , 'CASM' AS "CCE.USERNAME" , CCE.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "CCE.ADMIN_COURT_CODE" , CCE.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CCE_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CO_CASE_EVENTS CCE WHERE CCE.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber}
